name: Killi Ltd.
summary: Killi Ltd. operates privacy-compliant identity ecosystem that collects customers personal data and demographic information through its mobile and web applications in the United States, Canada, Australia, Singapore and New Zealand. The company's products include Killi Paycheck, Location Rewards, Killi Polls, Profile Rewards, and Shopping Rewards. It also operates a consumer-facing website uaretheproduct.io that allows consumers to determine their data's value broken out by individual platforms. The company was formerly known as Freckle Ltd. and changed its name to Killi Ltd. in May 2020. Killi Ltd. is based in Toronto, Canada.
